hypothesis: A chemically-informed conditional latent diffusion framework (CIAE-pretrained CompGen), pretrained on OC20 and fine-tuned on HEA with chemically-aware U-Net/DiT backbones and optional LoRA, will generate shell-wise catalytic surface compositions that more closely match true compositions—exhibiting lower Fréchet distance, lower leakage, and higher cosine similarity—and require less HEA training data than chemically-agnostic baselines.
